description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte gray and black color scheme, with a collapsible stock for adjustable length and ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, a prominent suppressor attached to the end of a long barrel, and a top-mounted red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal and polymer, with visible rails for accessory mounting. The pistol grip and adjustable buttstock are designed for comfort and control, while the fore-end includes a rail system for additional attachments. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and reduced noise are important.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte gray and black. Designed for ergonomic handling and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor, barrel alignment, and the compact profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the collapsible stock, detachable magazine, red dot sight, and full length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the adjustable stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the handguard, magazine, and accessory rails, with clear visibility of the suppressor and sight.
